💡 Takeaways for Aspiring Entrepreneurs
- There’s no single RIGHT way. Use YOUR advantages!
- Start with what you can—base hits lead to homers.
- Relationships and reputation unlock deals money can’t buy.
- When things go sideways (lost leases, rough stores)—pivot & press on.
